# SkoobiLabs

> Big-company software. Small-company price. SkoobiLabs designs, builds, hosts, and runs custom software for businesses that can't justify an enterprise vendor — and shouldn't have to.

SkoobiLabs is a software studio in Edmonds, Washington (Seattle area). We build custom web tools and mobile apps, host them on our own infrastructure, and operate them under contract — the client gets enterprise-grade capability without enterprise procurement, pricing, or overhead.

## What every client gets

- Single-tenant infrastructure: each client's data lives in its own database, never shared or partitioned with anyone else's
- Encryption in transit and at rest; access granted person-by-person by the client
- Crash reporting, product analytics, and session-level diagnostics on every deployment
- A staging environment — changes rehearse before touching production
- A monthly report with real uptime, traffic, and usage numbers
- A human on call: clients have the builder's direct email

## Pricing (published floors, not ceilings)

- Essential — from $2,500 build + $100/month: a focused, one-purpose tool (configurator, calculator, branded form)
- Professional — from $5,000 build + $150/month: database-backed workflows, third-party integrations
- Advanced — from $10,000 build + $250/month: full application with auth, multi-user roles, dashboards
- All retainers are 12-month minimum engagements. Optional live analytics dashboard add-on: $50–75/month on any tier.

## In production

- A candidate-intelligence platform for a Seattle IT consultancy: semantic search over 1,200+ resumes; recruiters query in plain English and results outperform general-purpose AI copilots
- A product configurator for a precision rifle manufacturer: photo-real previews, custom Cerakote finish design, locked order sheets
- A field-operations platform for a construction company (jobs, crews, schedules) — the origin of the SkoobiBuild platform

## Our own products

- HearVerse — Bible audio app, live on the Apple App Store
- HearNews, HearBooks — audio apps for news and public-domain books (TestFlight)
- SkoobiSlate — GTD task manager (private beta)
- SkoobiBuild — white-label job-tracking platform for small construction companies

## Contact

- Email: ask@skoobilabs.com
- Web: https://skoobilabs.com
